FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Continued To Mar-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Sandra Wilson (Trustee).

Ms. Callejo requested a continuance stating that they are close to wrapping up all of the details/issues. Status on filing of the accounting was continued to March 4, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Continued To Jan-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Sandra Wilson (Co-Trustee).

Ms. Callejo stated that the petition will be a final accounting, that the Rear Admiral passed away in May of 2012, that the condominium was sold in April or May of this year, that they expected to proceed on waiver of account and that the other option is to get the Trust out of Court supervision. Status on the accounting was continued to January 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Continued To Dec-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (126 Pfeiffer Street #3 San Francisco, Ca 94133)
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Sandra Wilson.

The sale was confirmed at $1,435,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed February 13, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order That Real Property Located At 126 Pfeiffer St., Unit 126-3, San Francisco, Ca And Held In Decedent'S Name Constitutes A Trust Asset

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (126 Pfeiffer Street #3 San Francisco, Ca 94133)
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Continued To Apr-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Genevieve Callejo for Sandra Wilson.

Ms. Callejo informs the Court that there is a glitch with regard to her petition and requested a continuance. The Court agrees and continued the matter to April 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Approval Of Trust Amendment And Payment Of Attorneys' Fees Pursuant To Mediation Agreement Procedure
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Pitts for Edwin Mark Wilson, Jr. (Petitioner). Katheryn Carey for Mark Wilson (Objector). Franchesca Callejo for Sandra Wilson (Acting Co-Trustee).

Mr. Pitts stated that his Client wishes to withdraw the Petition for Approval of Trust Amendment. The only issue before the Court is Payment of Attorney's Fees Pursuant to Mediation Agreement Procedure. The Attorney's fees were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
